title: Southport Outdoor Living
description: Southport Outdoor Living is a Canadian company established in 2008, specializing in outdoor patio furniture. They offer a wide range of products including lounge furniture, dining sets, grills, umbrellas, and custom cushions, all with a focus on quality and thoughtful design. Their services include design consultation and a commitment to supporting local suppliers by providing Canadian-made products. The company aims to deliver exceptional value and reliable service to clients in Toronto, Woodbridge, and Vaughan.
